title: Astonish Special Aromatic Edition Multi-Purpose Anti-Bacterial Surface Cleanser Spray, Pomegranate and Raspberry Scent, 12 X 750ml
features: Multipack: This pack of 12 allows you to clean for longer! 12 of our 750ml cleaners means you can keep stocked up and ready to clean
Tough on Dirt and Grime: A hard working cleaner for a thorough full house clean, our cleaning sprays are specially formulated to give an intense disinfection for hassle-free cleaning

Lasting Fresh Fruity Scent: Banish those unpleasant odours with the beautiful, fruity smelling fragrance. Bursting with pomegranate and raspberry, this multi-surface spray will leave your home feeling dreamy.
Kills Bacteria: Quickly eliminate germs and bugs including E.coli, Salmonella, Listeria and MRSA around the home by sanitising surfaces with this anti-bacterial cleansing solution

Easy to Use: Safe for use on most non-porous, hard surfaces, sinks, baths, cookers, door knobs, kitchen and bathroom, floors, light switches, toilets, showers. Making your housework simple and hassle-free
description: Product Description Here at Astonish we are proud of our products. Whatever your cleaning problem we aim to have a helpful cleaning solution. Now we’re not saying that we can work miracles, let’s be realistic cleaning can be hard work, but we’ve taken the time to ensure we’ve developed products that get the job done right, nothing less. Fill your home with beautiful fragrance with our Special Aromatic Edition cleaning products. Don’t just clean your home but transform your home into a subtropical paradise, leaving you feeling uplifted and invigorated. Our Antibacterial Cleanser trigger spray makes sure your surfaces are not just clean but hygienically clean, preventing the spread of bacteria. Good enough to eat your dinner off some might say. Great all-purpose product for use all around the home making you cleaning quick, easy, and effective, providing a safe environment for your little ones. Now with the aroma of Pomegranate and Raspberry, you can leave your home feeling fruity and fresh! With no bleach, no taint and no odour the product is suitable for use on food preparation areas plus is also ideal for use in fridges, on high-chairs, bins and toilets. Complies with EN13697:2001 for standard chemical disinfectant. Ingredients <5% disinfectants, <5% EDTA and salts thereof, <5% non-ionic surfactants, <5% perfumes Manufacturer Contact Information The London Oil Refining Company Ltd. Astonish House, Unit 8 Thornbury Industrial Park, Woodhall Road, Bradford, BD3 7AF See more
